_meta.draft_safety_note: This is a Git-first workflow definition. It is not yet executable n8n JSON. It describes the intended logic, contracts, and node structure so that a future n8n implementation can be built safely. Do not treat this as a production workflow. Do not bypass schema validation or publish gates.

workflow.name: intake-store-input
workflow.purpose: Collect and normalize strategic user input from the n8n intake form. Validate required fields, apply defaults for optional fields, and produce a clean normalized intake payload that downstream workflows can safely consume. This is the entry point of the entire workflow chain.

inputs.source: n8n Form Trigger or Webhook Trigger (runtime decision — see open_questions)

required_fields.rules: lowercase, numbers, hyphens only — no spaces

required_fields.note: User selects the active Shopify store connection. Does not manually enter domain. This selector is runtime-only and must NOT be stored as a domain string in project artifacts.
Governance control. Must default to true. Controls publish gating downstream.
Governance control. Controls what the workflow is allowed to do downstream.

optional_fields.default_fallback: Falls back to [primary_market] if not provided
Falls back to [primary_language] if not provided
Falls back to [primary_currency] if not provided

optional_fields.note: Optional list of competitor URLs for later clustering

fields_that_must_not_be_in_this_form: shop_domain — must be fetched from Shopify, not manually entered
shop_name — must be fetched from Shopify

normalized_intake_payload.description: Validated, normalized version of all intake fields with defaults applied. Passed to import-shopify-data and build-store-profile.

structure.shopify_store_selector: runtime connection reference (not stored in artifacts)

project_setup_payload.description: Minimal subset passed to project creation logic (if project does not yet exist).

project.schema.json.project_id: maps directly — enforces lowercase hyphenated pattern

nodes.name: Trigger
nodes.description: Entry point for the intake flow. In n8n, this is either a Form Trigger node (native n8n forms) that renders the intake form, or a Webhook Trigger that receives a structured POST payload from an external form. Runtime decision required — see open_questions.

nodes.name: Validate Required Fields
nodes.description: Check that all required fields are present and non-empty. Validate project_id against pattern ^[a-z0-9-]+$. Validate enum fields against their allowed value lists. If validation fails, throw an error with a clear message identifying the missing or invalid field. Do not proceed if required fields are missing.

nodes.name: Apply Defaults for Optional Fields
nodes.description: For each optional field that was not provided or is null/undefined, apply the documented default value. Apply array fallbacks: target_markets defaults to [primary_market], languages defaults to [primary_language], currencies defaults to [primary_currency]. Do not overwrite values that were explicitly set by the user.

nodes.name: Normalize Field Values
nodes.description: Normalize text: trim whitespace from all string fields. Normalize project_id to lowercase. Ensure all array fields are arrays (not comma-separated strings). Normalize boolean fields to true/false. Sanitize special_notes, must_feel_like, must_not_feel_like to strip any unexpected markup.

nodes.name: Extract Project Setup Payload
nodes.description: Extract the minimal project_setup_payload (project_id and project_name) as a separate output for project initialization logic.

nodes.name: Output to Downstream
nodes.description: Pass normalized_intake_payload and project_setup_payload to the next workflows: import-shopify-data (receives shopify_store_selector + project_id) and build-store-profile (receives full normalized_intake_payload). In n8n, this is accomplished via the subworkflow output or a direct workflow chaining mechanism.

assumptions: The shopify_store_selector field identifies a specific Shopify credential connection already configured in n8n. It is not a manually-typed domain string.
The intake form enforces the required field minimum at the UI level but this workflow also re-validates server-side in step 2.
All enum field values are enforced by the allowed_values lists in this document and must match the schema enums in store-profile.schema.json and project.schema.json.
The workflow does not create the project folder on disk. Project folder creation is a separate bootstrap step handled outside this workflow or in a dedicated step.
manual_review_required defaults to true and should never default to false unless the user explicitly sets it.
publish_mode defaults to draft-only and must never default to a value that would allow uncontrolled production publishing.
competitor_urls are stored as-is and are not validated as reachable URLs at intake time. They are input for the competitor clustering phase only.

open_questions.question: Should the trigger be an n8n native Form Trigger node or a Webhook Trigger that receives a structured POST from an external form?
open_questions.impact: Determines the trigger node type and how the form UI is built. n8n Form Trigger is simpler for MVP but limits UI control.
open_questions.recommended_default: n8n Form Trigger for MVP. Switch to Webhook + external form when the UI needs advanced validation or custom styling.

open_questions.question: Where should the normalized_intake_payload be persisted between workflow steps?
open_questions.impact: n8n can pass data between connected workflows via Execute Workflow Trigger, or the payload can be written to a temporary JSON file in the project path. The file-based approach aligns better with Git-first principles.
open_questions.recommended_default: Write normalized_intake_payload to projects/{project_id}/intake-payload.json as an intermediate artifact. This provides an audit trail and makes the intake visible in Git.

open_questions.question: Should project folder creation happen inside this workflow or be a separate bootstrap step?
open_questions.impact: This workflow produces the project_id but does not currently create the folder structure.
open_questions.recommended_default: Keep intake and project creation separate. A dedicated bootstrap step or subworkflow handles folder creation from project_setup_payload.

runtime_dependencies: n8n Form Trigger node or Webhook Trigger node (runtime choice)
n8n Code node (JavaScript) — available in all n8n versions
n8n Set node — available in all n8n versions
No external API credentials required at this stage
No Shopify connection used in this workflow — connection is selected but used in import-shopify-data
